creator: Cy.Schubert@komquats.com
text:
Cy Schubert writes:
> Try the following patch and let me know if it works.
> 
> Index: Makefile
> ===================================================================
> RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/net/ntp-devel/Makefile,v
> retrieving revision 1.52
> diff -u -r1.52 Makefile
> --- Makefile	13 Jan 2008 06:50:52 -0000	1.52
> +++ Makefile	24 Jul 2008 23:17:37 -0000
> @@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
>  
>  PORTNAME=	ntp
>  PORTVERSION=	4.2.5p109
> +PORTREVISION=	1
>  CATEGORIES=	net ipv6
>  MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.udel.edu/pub/ntp/ntp4/ntp-dev/ \
>  		http://www.eecis.udel.edu/~ntp/ntp_spool/ntp4/ntp-dev/ \
> @@ -44,6 +45,11 @@
>  
>  MAN1=		ntp-keygen.1 ntpd.1 ntpdc.1 ntpq.1 sntp.1
>  
> +.if ${ARCH} == "amd64"
> +post-patch:
> +	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e "s/if (mlockall(MCL_CURRENT|MCL_FUTURE) < 0)/if (ml
> ockall(MCL_CURRENT) < 0)" ${WRKSRC}/ntpd/ntpd.c
> +.endif
> +
>  post-install:
>  	@${MKDIR} ${EXAMPLESDIR}
>  	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/conf/* ${EXAMPLESDIR}

This patch is not broken. Use this one insted.

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/net/ntp-devel/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.59
diff -u -r1.59 Makefile
--- Makefile	30 Jan 2009 19:56:05 -0000	1.59
+++ Makefile	31 Mar 2009 23:11:17 -0000
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	ntp
 PORTVERSION=	4.2.5p158
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	net ipv6
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.udel.edu/pub/ntp/ntp4/ntp-dev/ \
 		http://www.eecis.udel.edu/~ntp/ntp_spool/ntp4/ntp-dev/ \
@@ -52,6 +53,11 @@
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
+.if ${ARCH} == "amd64"
+post-patch:
+	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e "s/if (mlockall(MCL_CURRENT|MCL_FUTURE) < 0)/if (mlockall(MCL_CURRENT) < 0)/" ${WRKSRC}/ntpd/ntpd.c
+.endif
+
 .if exists(${LOCALBASE}/bin/net-snmp-config)
 # NTP autodects net-snmp and if found builds and installs a binary that
 # uses it. If detected, modify dependencies and package list.


-- 
Cheers,
Cy Schubert <Cy.Schubert@komquats.com>
FreeBSD UNIX:  <cy@FreeBSD.org>   Web:  http://www.FreeBSD.org

			e**(i*pi)+1=0
